Commercial

Hyperbaric chambers
for wellness facilities.

A stunning, robust, hard-shell pod - your clients step inside, settle into reclining seats and breathe oxygen at up to 2.4 ATA behind large windows. HPO.TECH chambers, supplied and installed by Thrive across wellness centres, gyms and longevity clinics worldwide.

Get a quote See the models
The range

From one seat to four.

Every chamber in our core range operates at up to 2.4 ATA - the pressure the published research is built on. Dimensions can be extended for legroom or headroom, windows added for enhanced visibility, and exterior finish, colour and upholstery specified to suit the installation.

1 person

Zeugma

Up to 2.4 ATA

A single-person chamber for daily use. Panoramic acrylic windows, seated comfort, compact footprint with no structural build-out required. The choice of Bryan Johnson.

The right fit for boutique PT studios, members' clubs and longevity-focused facilities where exclusivity is part of the offer.
2 person

Atlantis

Up to 2.4 ATA

A two-person chamber. Modular construction installs through a standard doorway without structural build-out. Premium reclining leather seats, panoramic windows.

A popular configuration for wellness facilities, gyms and physio practices adding HBOT to existing premises.
4 person

Mediterranean

Up to 2.4 ATA

A four-person multiplace chamber. Premium leather seating, full panoramic windows, individual oxygen delivery per seat, dual touchscreens. The specification used by professional sports clubs and high-throughput clinics.

Best for facilities with the volume to use the capacity.
Ask us about the models
The protocol clients come back for

A revenue asset, not an overhead.

Hyperbaric oxygen works as a course, not a one-off - clients run a block of sessions over weeks, then come back for the next. That rhythm is what makes it commercial: the same people booked in week after week, a protocol they stay with and recommend to others. For a facility, it is the difference between a one-time sale and a standing revenue line.

MediterraneanAtlantisZeugma £€$
Revenue / month
Revenue / year

Want to know how fast it pays for itself? That depends on the chamber. Tell us your facility and we'll use our own clinic experience to help you plan and provide you with a quote.

Get a quote

The research

Built on the dose the studies used.

The performance research behind these chambers comes from a blinded, placebo-controlled trial run at the Sagol Center, Shamir Medical Center: healthy master athletes completed 40 sessions and showed measured gains in aerobic capacity - VO2 max and anaerobic threshold - with more of the cell's own power plants doing the work (Hadanny et al., 2022). It dosed at 2.0 ATA - within the range every HPO.TECH chamber reaches, up to 2.4. The effect is thought to come from the body's own response to the rise and fall of oxygen, and where it reaches beyond stamina is being actively studied. We hold the source studies and share them on request.

Hadanny et al., 2022 · Sports Medicine - Open
See the science
Hard-shell, not soft

The pressure the evidence sits with.

The published evidence - across recovery and performance - sits with hard-shell chambers operating up to around 2.4 ATA, the pressure at which the oxygen carried in blood plasma rises enough for the mechanism to engage. Every HPO.TECH chamber reaches that range as standard. That is the technical line between a hard chamber and a soft or inflatable one.

See the science Read the buying guide

Delivered pressure up to 2.4 ATA the hard-shell working range

Already running a chamber?

The upgrade conversation.

If you currently run an inflatable or less advanced system and are considering an upgrade to a premium chamber, you are not alone. It is a conversation we have daily with established HBOT operators - and the one we are best placed to have, because we run these chambers ourselves every day.

Soft / inflatable / low cost hard-shellPremium hard-shell · up to 2.4 ATA
Why Thrive

You're buying from someone who runs one.

Thrive Hyperbaric founder David Gumbleton runs a working hyperbaric clinic in Bath UK and uses these chambers every day, alongside Bath Rugby. So you are not buying from a reseller - you are buying from an operator who helps you run yours. The chamber costs the same as going direct; his experience is what Thrive adds.

Get a quote About Thrive
The right chamber - your call

Your brand, your finish, your call. David helps you weigh model, capacity and spec against your space and clientele - then we render it in your branding before you commit.

The managed install

Engineered in sections, these chambers go into spaces that defeat conventional kit - narrow access, upper floors, existing buildings. We manage the delivery and commissioning.

Running it day to day

Protocols, training, maintenance, throughput - the know-how that only comes from running a clinic on these chambers. David trains your team and stays on hand as you go.

In facilities worldwide

Where these chambers run.

HPO.TECH chambers run in wellness centres, gyms, recovery studios and longevity clinics across the US, Europe, Middle East and Asia. Most are installed in the US, where we work with install and servicing teams run from Detroit, Michigan.

Humanaut Health, Austin, TX
Next Health Fort Lauderdale, FL
Remedy Place, New York

Cleared for medical use in Saudi Arabia & the UAE

Every HPO.TECH system holds full marketing authorisation from the Saudi Food & Drug Authority (SFDA) and is registered with the UAE Ministry of Health and Prevention (MOHAP).

See our certifications

Tell us your space and how you will use it. We will show you exactly how it works commercially, and what it costs.
